column1: AAA Restaurant Fire Control|https://www.aaafirecontrol.com/|https://www.aaafirecontrol.com/contact|Providence-Warwick|Rhode Island, southeastern Massachusetts, eastern Connecticut, and broader Southern New England commercial kitchens||john@aaafirecontrol.com|401-216-1070|Official site says AAA Restaurant Fire Control is a family-owned Southern New England restaurant kitchen hood cleaning and duct degreasing company founded in 1973, explicitly offers restaurant exhaust and duct cleaning to keep kitchen exhausts clean and fire-safe, and the official contact page publishes john@aaafirecontrol.com with 401-216-1070.

Applied Safety LLC|https://www.whereorg.com/applied-safety-llc-18791284|https://www.bers.nyc.gov/assets/fdny/downloads/pdf/business/approved-companies-commercial-cooking.pdf#page=6-applied-safety|New York City|New York City, Long Island City, and broader tri-state commercial kitchens needing grease ductwork cleaning, hood maintenance, and suppression support|Jose Hernandez|jhernandez@appliedsafetynyc.com|718-608-6292|FDNY's April 15, 2026 approved commercial cooking companies list names Applied Safety, Llc in Long Island City with Jose Hernandez, jhernandez@appliedsafetynyc.com, and 718-608-6292, while the public WhereOrg listing categorizes Applied Safety LLC under kitchen exhaust system cleaning and explicitly describes grease ductwork cleaning, kitchen hood maintenance, and tri-state coverage.

Phantom Kitchens|https://phantomk.co/|https://phantomk.co/|Kingston-Hudson Valley|Hudson Valley, New York, New Jersey, Massachusetts, Connecticut, and Pennsylvania commercial kitchens, schools, churches, and medical facilities|Phantom Kitchens|info@phantomk.co|845-640-4402|Official site says Phantom Kitchens is a kitchen fire protection company that offers hood exhaust installations, hood removal, hood cleaning, fire suppression installations, and exhaust system maintenance, lists multi-state Northeast coverage from Kingston, and publishes info@phantomk.co with 845-640-4402.
